description:
Summer/Winter Operating Area: British Virgin Islands, Leeward Islands, US Virgin Islands, Windward Islands

Welcome aboard MARIA THERESE, a Sunreef Supreme 68 Power Yacht that elevates the concept of luxury and sophistication at sea. Designed with precision and a passion for perfection, this nautical marvel offers an extraordinary charter experience unlike any other. Newly built in 2024, MARIA THERESE promises a voyage steeped in elegance, indulgence, and unforgettable memories.

Every inch of the MARIA THERESE is a testament to Sunreef Yachts' commitment to bespoke craftsmanship. MARIA THERESE boasts expansive living areas that epitomize the concept of a floating paradise. The main salon and dining area extend seamlessly to form an elegant beach club ambiance, adorned with chic, modern décor. Generous deck areas invite you to soak in the sun, while the flybridge bar offers a picturesque setting to sip cocktails against the backdrop of the Caribbean’s crystal waters and lush coastlines. For those seeking peak relaxation, the jacuzzi awaits—offering a front-row seat to serenity. She accommodates up to 8 guests in 4 elegantly appointed double cabins with queen beds, each with its own shower, electric head, and wash basin.

Sail in whisper-quiet tranquility thanks to MARIA THERESE’s cutting-edge design and technology. Her innovative systems ensure peaceful nights, with air conditioning running silently while you sleep. Whether you're drifting through secluded coves or cruising the open sea, her advanced hull design ensures a smooth, stable, and serene passage for everyone on board.

blueprint.name: MARIA THERESE

toys.label: Beach Games - Bote Bag Toss, Smash Ball

tenders: 1 x Tender Highfield Sport 460 with 70hp Yamaha outboard engine

crew.name: Samuel Marque
crew.bio:
Captain Samuel Marque brings a unique blend of expertise, adventure, and genuine passion for the ocean. Originally from France and raised on the shores of Bali, Sam’s love for the sea started early, progressing from dinghy sailing as a child to commanding luxury yachts across the globe. His background in competitive surfing speaks to his deep respect for the water and the skills that come with it.

Sam holds a Yachtmaster Offshore certification, an Approved Engine Course (AEC1), and is a PADI Open Water Diver. Fluent in French, English, and Indonesian, he’s as comfortable navigating cultural nuances as he is plotting a transatlantic passage.

With thousands of nautical miles under his belt, from the Mediterranean to the Caribbean and Southeast Asia, Sam is known for his meticulous approach to navigation and his ability to create unforgettable guest experiences. Over the past three years, he has successfully run charters between St. Martin (SXM), the US Virgin Islands (USVI), and the British Virgin Islands (BVI), showcasing his deep knowledge of these cruising grounds and his commitment to delivering seamless itineraries. Whether leading flotillas in Greece or managing ocean crossings, he thrives in dynamic environments and adapts seamlessly to every challenge.

More than a captain, Sam is a storyteller and a true seafarer. His dedication to safety and passion for sharing the magic of the ocean ensure that every journey leaves guests with the best memories cherished forever.

crew.name: Liam McNaughton
crew.bio:
Liam is a professional yacht chef with nearly a decade of fine dining experience and a deep passion for culinary craftsmanship. His journey began in the family kitchen, where an early love for food quickly turned into a clear talent. After finishing school, Liam trained at the renowned Prue Leith Culinary Institute, learning under some of South Africa’s most respected chefs. From there, he set out to prove himself, traveling the country, competing in Junior Chef of the Year at 23, and becoming sous chef of a 600-seater upscale restaurant by 24. 

Over the years, Liam has built a career defined by discipline, creativity, and quiet focus. He’s worked as a culinary lecturer training future superyacht chefs, taken on private chef roles, and completed over 20 high-end yacht charters. Onboard, he’s known for never repeating a menu, each dish is tailored to the moment, offering guests a unique and thoughtful dining experience every time. Calm under pressure and serious about his craft, Liam lets his food speak for itself: refined, expressive, and full of character.

crew.name: Mark Kotzee
crew.bio:
Mark is the embodiment of adventure and technical expertise. Born and raised in South Africa, he started his career in law but soon realized that his heart belonged outdoors, not behind a desk. His love for travel, fitness, and hands-on work led him to the yachting industry, where he has flourished as a deckhand and engineer.
Mark brings a strong foundation in seamanship, technical maintenance, and problem-solving to every charter. Whether he’s polishing stainless steel to perfection, handling lines during docking, or troubleshooting in the engine room, Mark approaches every task with precision and pride. His experience spans multiple yachts and includes everything from exterior detailing to complex mechanical repairs.

Off duty, Mark is an avid adventurer. He loves hiking remote trails, diving into crystal-clear waters, and riding motorbikes, dreaming of one day travelling the world on two wheels. Sports, fitness, and nature are central to his lifestyle, and he’s always eager to share his passion for the outdoors with guests. Mark’s easygoing personality and can-do attitude ensure that every charter runs smoothly, with plenty of smiles along the way.

crew.name: Carmen Kotzee
crew.bio:
Carmen’s journey to yachting is as unique as her skill set. Originally from South Africa, she holds both a Bachelor’s and Master’s degree in Law, specializing in environmental law. After years in the corporate world, Carmen realized her true passion lay in hospitality and adventure rather than boardrooms. Her transition to yachting has been seamless, thanks to her exceptional organizational skills, eye for detail, and ability to thrive under pressure.

Guests will quickly notice Carmen’s warm, approachable nature and her commitment to creating a welcoming atmosphere onboard. She’s not only a meticulous stewardess but also a versatile team player, comfortable assisting in the galley, on deck, or even in the engine room when needed.

When she’s not ensuring the yacht looks pristine, Carmen enjoys hiking, snorkeling, diving, and staying active. She’s passionate about fitness and health, loves experimenting with new recipes, and often unwinds with a good book or podcast. Carmen’s blend of professionalism and genuine enthusiasm for life at sea makes her an invaluable part of the crew and a delight for guests to have onboard.
